ItacPersonItem.Notes: On the involvement of Patrizi in the Accademia Veneziana, see Lina Bolzoni, ‘Il “Badoaro” di Francesco Patrizi e l`Accademia veneziana della Fama’, in Giornale Storico della Letteratura Italiana, 158 (1981), pp. 71-101.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
